description_long: This is a dark wooden cabinet with ornate carvings on its front, including decorative motifs and two prominent cherub-like figures near the top. The cabinet features two vertically aligned doors, each adorned with intricate patterns and recessed panels. The top of the cabinet has a curved, decorative crown, adding to its antique and elegant appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its overall design suggests it is a freestanding piece, likely used for storage in an urban setting such as a hallway, entryway, or garage.
description: A dark, ornately carved wooden cabinet with two decorative doors and a curved crown top, standing on four short legs. The front features intricate motifs and cherub figures, while the sides and back are plain.
description_view_0: The front view shows two carved doors with decorative motifs and cherub figures above, as well as the curved crown top and short legs.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible decoration or openings.
description_view_2: The back view displays a completely flat, undecorated wooden surface, highlighting the cabinet's solid construction.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a plain wooden panel with no features.
